Name: ActionButtonParam
Description: Determines the parameters used for interactable prompts.

Fields.Name: Region Type
Fields.Description: Range shape (cylinder, prism, capsule)

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly [1]
Fields.Description: Specify the dummy polygon ID that is the center of the bottom of the range. If there is no dummy polygib or -1 is entered, the center coordinates will be the reference.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly [2]
Fields.Description: Used only when the range type is a capsule. Additional dummy polygon (capsule) that creates a line segment with two dummy polygons

Fields.Name: Radius
Fields.Description: Radius (cylinder / capsule)

Fields.Name: Angle
Fields.Description: Angle (cylinder)

Fields.Name: Depth
Fields.Description: Depth (prism)

Fields.Name: Width
Fields.Description: Width (prism)

Fields.Name: Height
Fields.Description: Height (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Bottom Height Offset
Fields.Description: How much to raise or lower the Y coordinate of the bottom (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Angle Difference Check Type
Fields.Description: Angle difference judgment type (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Allowable Angle Difference
Fields.Description: Allowable angle difference (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Textbox Type
Fields.Description: Text box type

Fields.Name: Action Group ID
Fields.Description: Which action group does this action button belong to. For example, you may be able to use X action whilst hanging, but you cannot use Y action.

Fields.Name: Is Invalid when Riding
Fields.Description: If enabled, this action will not appear whilst in the 'riding' state.

Fields.Name: Is Grayed Out when Riding
Fields.Description: If enabled, this action will be grayed out whilst in the 'riding' state.

Fields.Name: Display Line
Fields.Description: If enabled, a line will appear from the icon to the ground.

Fields.Name: Text ID
Fields.Description: The FMG Entry ID to display.

Fields.Name: Invalid Event Flag
Fields.Description: If the event flag is ON, then this action will not appear.

Fields.Name: Grayout Event Flag
Fields.Description: If the event flag is ON, then this action will be grayed out.

Fields.Name: Display Priority
Fields.Description: Priority when displaying multiple actions, 0 is highest priority.

Fields.Name: Execution Invalid Time
Fields.Description: Invalid time after execution (-infinite by value)

Fields.Name: Same Category Action Display
Fields.Description: Whether or not action buttons with the same category specified in the program are displayed on top of each other.

Fields.Name: Effect Display Distance
Fields.Description: Range effect viewing distance, -1 means no range effect.

Fields.Name: Execution Button Hold Time
Fields.Description: When the judgment is active, if the press key is pressed for the stated number of seconds, it is considered to have been pressed. If it is 0, it is not judged to be pressed and held.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon to display for the action in the world.

Fields.Name: Point Radius
Fields.Description: Radius (point display range is cylindrical). -1 refers to the number of actionable ranges.

Fields.Name: Point Height
Fields.Description: Height (point display range is cylindrical). -1 refers to the number of the actionable range

Fields.Name: Point Base Height Offset
Fields.Description: How much to raise or lower the Y coordinate of the bottom.

Fields.Name: Icon Offset: X
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the icon in the world along the x-axis. Positive is right, negative is left.

Fields.Name: Icon Offset: Y
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the icon in the world along the y-axis. Positive is above, negative is below.

Fields.Name: Icon Offset: Z
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the icon in the world along the z-axis. Positive is forward, negative is backward.

Fields.Name: Done Flag
Fields.Description: The event flag to apply upon execution. -1 means no flag is set.
